whatsNew: Added Property Maintenance Operative ST0171 Version 1.1 as a complete selectable course.
Added 15 efficiently organised PMO assignments, each mapped to exactly two Skills, three Knowledge items and one Behaviour.
Mapped all 31 Knowledge, 25 Skills and 6 Behaviours across the course without leaving any KSB uncovered.
Added six Skills-only photographic prompts and six concise statement prompts to every PMO assignment.
Added 15 PMO Trade Academy tests using Knowledge and Behaviour evidence only, 15 practical tasks with tailored mark sheets, and 15 matching Witness Testimonies.
Added 15 detailed PMO revision packs, providing 450 teaching slides and 150 knowledge checks across the course.
Added a PMO-specific 40-question EPA knowledge bank, complex multi-trade practical mock and 15-assignment professional discussion.
Added PMO-specific SafeMate, MeasureMate, FixMate, MaterialMate and QuoteMate tools.
Retains the corrected QR code and sharing link for https://ddrnfinch.github.io/AppPlus/.
